news.headline: Smith+Nephew launches CORIOGRAPH™ Pre-Op Planning for Total Hip Arthroplasty, enhancing CORI◊ System options.
news.summary: The most recent addition to the CORI◊ Surgical System lineup offers a customized solution for both patients and surgeons. This expansion includes a range of new features and options to better meet the needs of individuals undergoing surgical procedures.

news.headline: Existing-home sales increased by 4.8% in November to 4.15 million, with a 6.1% year-over-year gain. Median price rose to $406,100. Unsold inventory was at 1.33 million with a 3.8-month supply. First-time buyers accounted for 30% of sales in November.
news.summary: Existing-home sales rose by 4.8% in November to a rate of 4.15 million, marking the quickest pace since March. This is a 6.1% increase from the previous year, the largest gain since June 2021. The median existing-home sales price increased by 4.7% to $406,100, marking the 17th consecutive month of year-over-year price hikes. The inventory of unsold homes dropped by 2.9% to 1.33 million, which is equivalent to a 3.8 months' supply at the current monthly sales pace. Lawrence Yun, NAR Chief Economist, notes that home sales momentum is increasing due to factors like job growth, increased housing inventory, and consumers adjusting to mortgage rates between 6% and 7%. The median home price across all housing types in November was $406,100, up 4.7% from the previous year. 30% of sales in November were from first-time buyers, while cash sales represented 25% of transactions.

US Existing Home Sales change Actual 4.8% (Forecast 3.03%, Previous 3.4%)

Marchesi Frescobaldi introduces AI-driven AR experience for wine labels in Florence, Italy. Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: Florence-based company Marchesi Frescobaldi is enhancing its online presence by converting its wine labels into an interactive platform, marking a significant step in their digital expansion efforts. The longstanding Tuscan company, known for its rich history and adherence to tradition, is embracing innovative technologies to engage consumers in new ways. The initiative, announced on December 19, 2024, aims to provide a unique experience for customers and strengthen the brand's digital footprint. This transformation signifies a strategic move for Marchesi Frescobaldi as they seek to stay competitive in the modern market landscape.

news.headline: Director of Bitcoin Office in the Country: El Salvador's official bitcoin wallet, Chivo, to be sold or discontinued after agreement with the IMF.
UK's PM Starmer: I'm not a tariffs fan; we have to make sure we avoid them.
NTT report highlights top 5 cybersecurity trends for 2025, based on expert analysis.
news.summary: In Tokyo, NTT recently released insights from leading cybersecurity executives and experts on projected trends that will impact the cybersecurity sector by 2025. The report highlights key developments anticipated to shape the industry in the coming years, drawing on the perspectives of top professionals.

news.headline: Andromeda Surgical in Chile announced world's first robotic HoLEP procedure by Dr. Cristián Trucco at Universidad Católica.
news.summary: In Santiago, Chile on December 19, 2024, Andromeda Surgical, a leader in surgical robotics, revealed a significant achievement. Dr. Cristián Trucco from Universidad Católica successfully conducted the inaugural robotic-assisted holmium laser enucleation of the prostate (HoLEP). This innovative procedure marks a pioneering advancement in the medical field, showcasing the capabilities of surgical robotics technology.

news.headline: CPSC warns against liquid-burning fire pits as they cause flame hazards. Two deaths and dozens of injuries reported. #ConsumerSafety
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Washington, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission issued a warning advising consumers against purchasing or using fire pits designed for burning pooled alcohol or other liquid fuels. These items are marketed as tabletop fire pits, fire pots, miniature fireplaces, or portable units. The CPSC is emphasizing the potential dangers associated with these products and the need for consumer caution.

news.headline: Amazon drivers at seven distribution centers stage a strike. The retail giant predicts minimal impact on operations. #Teamsters #strike
news.summary: The large retail company stated that it anticipates minimal impact from the strike by a portion of Teamsters union members on its operations.

news.headline: Ryan named to Newsweek Excellence 1000 Index 2025, recognizes top companies in 25 industries for financial and social responsibility.
news.summary: In Dallas, Ryan, a prominent worldwide tax service and software provider, has recently been included in the Newsweek Excellence 1000 Index 2025, which features 1,000 companies evaluated based on various criteria. The recognition highlights organizations from 25 different sectors for exhibiting exceptional financial responsibility, stakeholder ratings, and social responsibility ratings. The rankings are determined through a collaboration between Newsweek and Best Practice Institute (BPI), a firm specializing in leadership development and benchmark research.

news.headline: Ascent and Nook partner to enhance credit union experience. Ascent provides digital solutions for financial institutions.
news.summary: Today in New York, Ascent Platform, a top provider of digital experience solutions for financial institutions, revealed their collaboration with Nook, a new CUSO catering to credit unions. This partnership aims to enhance member experience by offering seamless services. The collaboration comes as a strategic move to assist Nook in catering to the expanding credit union market. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Private equity firm Vance Street Capital partners with Fumex Air Filtration Systems to support business growth.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, a private equity firm named Vance Street Capital, located in Los Angeles, shared news of its partnership with Fumex Air Filtration Systems. This collaboration aims to provide support and guidance to the Company's business and management team as they move forward.

news.headline: LivAway Suites and West77 Partners to open first Texas location in San Marcos, marking a milestone in reshaping extended-stay accommodations.
news.summary: LivAway Suites, in partnership with West77 Partners, has officially started construction on their first Texas location in San Marcos. The collaboration between the two companies aims to revolutionize the extended-stay economy. The groundbreaking of this site signifies a major achievement for LivAway.

news.headline: Insight Global survey shows human and AI essential in hiring.2025: AI tech transforms future roles.
news.summary: Insight Global, a global professional services and staffing firm, recently shared findings from a thorough survey on the significance of human and artificial intelligence in the evolution of recruitment. The results of the AI in Hiring 2025 survey highlight the vital role AI is expected to play in the hiring process moving forward. The study delves into how AI technologies are transforming recruitment practices, showcasing the growing importance of an integrated approach combining human expertise with AI tools.

news.headline: See Antony Blinken discuss Syria, Israel, and transition to Trump admin..
news.summary: The latest figures indicate that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, marking a decrease of 0.5% from last month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, outperforming previous estimates. The stock market also saw gains, with the main indices rising by 2-3% across the board. Analysts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and confidence, as well as strong performance in key industries such as technology and healthcare. The Federal Reserve is closely monitoring these developments as it considers adjustments to monetary policy in the coming months. Overall, the data signals a recovering economy and potentially brighter prospects for the job market and investments.

news.headline: ATS closed $200M senior notes offering, part of single series with $400M. Notes due Aug 21, 2032 at 6.50%.
news.summary: ATS Corporation, headquartered in Cambridge, Ontario, has finalized a private placement offering of C$200 million in 6.50% senior unsecured notes due on August 21, 2032. The offering of these Notes, which are now a part of a single series with existing notes totaling $400 million, has been successfully closed. The Notes hold identical terms and will be made fungible following the end of the statutory hold period. This move is in line with ATS's strategic financial planning and aims to support the company's growth and operations.

news.headline: Meme coin Fartcoin hits $1 billion valuation with trading price at $1.06, receiving attention from Stephen Colbert.
news.summary: Fartcoin (CRYPTO: FARTCOIN), a meme-based cryptocurrency often deemed as a jest, has experienced a significant surge, hitting a new record high. The token reached a market capitalization of $1.06 billion with a trading price of $1.06, prompting discussions within the cryptocurrency community. User ‘tflo__’ expressed this by noting, “Fartcoin mindshare is undefeated.” The rise in Fartcoin's value led to mentions on a segment of late-night host Stephen Colbert’s show, where he humorously acknowledged investing in the "very real cryptocurrency" Fartcoin, labeling it as "silent but wealthy." This unexpected success of Fartcoin has generated considerable attention within the crypto space.

news.headline: Stablecoins revolutionize global finance, with transaction volumes nearing double that of Visa; reshaping payment systems worldwide.
news.summary: Stablecoins are revolutionizing global finance as they address inefficiencies in financial systems. At the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets conference led by Paul McCaffery, panelists discussed the transformative impact of these digital currencies on payment systems. CEO of VanEck, Jan van Eck, emphasized the growing use of stablecoins in payments and cross-border transactions, stating that stablecoin transaction volumes are nearing twice that of Visa. This surge in adoption underscores stablecoins' efficiency and attractiveness, particularly in regions with volatile currencies or limited access to traditional banking services. Van Eck highlighted that emerging markets are at the forefront of stablecoin adoption, utilizing them as a viable alternative in areas where national currencies are unstable. The global payments landscape is undergoing a notable shift due to the increasing prominence of stablecoins.

news.headline: Shiba Inu whale makes $109M profit holding SHIB since 2020. Sold 250B SHIB for $6.05M. Still holds 2.15T SHIB. Price falls despite whale transaction.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency dubbed as the "Dogecoin Killer," Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB), is projected to experience a significant surge in value despite its current lack of movement. Data from Lookonchain reveals that an early SHIB investor, known as a whale, recently sold 250 billion SHIB tokens for $6.05 million in profit. This whale initially invested $3,800 in August 2020 to acquire 15.28 trillion SHIB, which soared to a value of $1.22 billion at its peak. Their timely actions have resulted in a profit of $108 million. The whale recently transferred 399.99 billion SHIB, equivalent to $9.69 million, to Gemini in the last hour while still retaining 2.15 trillion SHIB tokens.

news.headline: Whale Tokens in high demand with 5 million players. Welcome to Whale collection sees 28K transactions and 62k TON volume.
news.summary: Blockchain gaming has faced challenges in achieving widespread success, but Whale is changing the game. Through its upcoming Whale Token launch, the project has attracted millions of players via its Telegram miniapp, Wheel of Whales.Traditionally, when people think of whales in the crypto world, they envision wealthy individuals or venture capitalists. However, the Welcome to Whale free mint NFT collection has introduced a new concept of whales in the community.Despite starting off modestly, the Welcome to Whale collection has gained momentum. With 28,000 transactions and 62,000 TON volume over the past year, the floor price has remained steady at 4 to 9 TON. This stability is largely due to the popular Wheel of Whales minigame.This success story marks a significant shift in the blockchain gaming industry, demonstrating the potential for growth and engagement in this space.

FuelCell Energy's Q4 revenue surges 120% to $49.326 million, with backlog up 13%, but losses persist. Shares drop.
news.summary: FuelCell Energy Inc (NASDAQ:FCEL) saw a decrease in share price following the release of its fourth quarter 2024 financial results. The company experienced a significant increase in total revenues, which rose by 120% year-over-year to $49.326 million, outperforming the anticipated $39.716 million. Product revenues also saw a notable uptick, reaching $25.4 million for the quarter ending on October 31, 2024, up from $10.5 million in the previous year. This surge was primarily attributed to a $18.0 million contribution from the GGE Agreement for fuel cell module replacements in Korea and $7.7 million from a sales contract with Ameresco for a 2.8 MW platform for the Sacramento Sewer District. Additionally, service agreements revenue increased to $5.6 million from $(0.8) million, fueled by two module exchanges during the period. Furthermore, generation revenue saw a 40.3% boost to $12.0 million, driven by the Toyota and Derby projects. Advanced Technologies. ...The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Knightscope's Emergency Communications sees growth with 12 new contracts, expanding security services.
news.summary: Mountain View, California-based company, Knightscope, has announced the signing of twelve new contracts for their Emergency Communications services. These contracts signify the continued growth and demand for Knightscope's security robot services. The company's focus on providing advanced security solutions is evident in the increasing number of clients opting for their services. This development highlights the expanding market for security robots, with Knightscope emerging as a prominent player in this sector.

news.headline: Asia-Pacific HAAPS market to reach $555.9 million by 2033 from $210.1 million in 2023, growing at 10.22% CAGR.
news.summary: A new report on the Asia-Pacific High-Altitude Aeronautical Platform Station (HAAPS) Market predicts significant growth in the coming years. The market is expected to reach $555.9 million by 2033, up from $210.1 million in 2023, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.22% between 2023 and 2033. The report covers various aspects such as type, subsystem, end user, and country analysis within the HAAPS market. This growth trend reflects a promising future for the high-altitude aeronautical platform industry in the Asia-Pacific region.

news.headline: Canyon, Ascendant, and Bond form Joint Venture to develop 560-unit multifamily community in Phoenix.
news.summary: In Phoenix, Canyon Partners Real Estate LLC, Ascendant Capital Partners, and Bond Companies have partnered to develop Inspire Sonoran Desert, a high-end multifamily community in North Valley, Phoenix. The Joint Venture will oversee the construction of the 560-unit property, with financing secured from Kennedy Wilson. The project, designed by Gensler, is set to feature top-notch amenities and is situated in a prime location within the city.

news.summary: A new report reveals that over 10,000 households in the city are currently experiencing homelessness, with more than 5,000 individuals sleeping on the streets. The study also indicates a 15% increase in homelessness compared to last year, with a significant rise in families seeking shelter. Additionally, there has been a 20% spike in the number of homeless youth aged 18-24. The report highlights the urgent need for more resources and support to address the growing crisis of homelessness in the city.

news.headline: Meeting outcomes and merger updates with key figures #businessnews
news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 5.2%, which is the lowest it has been in the past ten years. This decrease in unemployment has resulted in 500,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter alone. news.headline: Ultimate camping multi-tool EATi by Septem solves gear woes with its all-in-one design. Launch on Kickstarter.

Many travelers face the challenge of searching through their backpacks for specific items like forks, dealing with a mix of unfamiliar camping tools, or unexpectedly realizing they lack essential tools while in the middle of a mountain climb. Septem aims to address these issues with their new product.

This development marks a successful year for the company as it solidifies its reputation as a credible source in the cryptocurrency space through strengthened editorial standards and a focus on global growth.

news.headline: Critical One Energy Inc. has extended payment terms to Star Minerals, enhancing flexibility in their Agreement.

news.headline: Lilly Pulitzer acquires copyrights to vintage print library, reconnecting brand with iconic artist Suzie Zuze for future collections.

This renowned brand, known for creating American Resort Wear, is based in Palm Beach, Florida. The acquisition took place on December 19, 2024. This move provides a solid basis for upcoming collections and innovations, setting the stage for future developments in the fashion industry.

news.headline: Top companies honored at 2024 Global Corporate Excellence Awards by Business Worldwide Magazine, recognizing innovation and success worldwide.
news.summary: In London on December 19, 2024, Business Worldwide Magazine's (BWM) Global Corporate Excellence Awards showcased exceptional companies on a global scale. The prestigious awards recognize businesses that stand out for innovation and excellence in their respective industries. The judging panel selected top companies that demonstrate outstanding performance, setting a high bar for the industry.

news.headline: NEO Battery Materials partners with North American battery manufacturer to develop silicon-enhanced battery technology for automotive applications.
news.summary: NEO Battery Materials Ltd. has recently entered into a joint development agreement with a North American battery cell manufacturer on November 30, 2024. The company, listed on TSXV as NBM and on OTC as NBMFF, specializes in low-cost silicon anode materials for lithium-ion batteries, which support longer-lasting and faster-charging capabilities. The collaboration is focused on improving silicon anode materials for specialized electric automotive and mobility uses. No significant terms or considerations were disclosed regarding this agreement.

news.summary: In 2025, Baltic Horizon Fund plans to release its financial results and hold an investor meeting on the following schedule. This will include presenting important figures such as revenue, expenses, and profits for the specified period. The fund aims to provide transparency and communication to its investors by adhering to this timeline for the disclosure of key financial information.

"Nothing Even Matters" premieres on Peacock Dec 20, starring Brad James, Kearia Schroeder, and others. Maverick Entertainment production.
news.summary: A new action-drama film titled "Nothing Even Matters" featuring talents such as Brad James, Kearia Schroeder, Reginae Carter, Charmin Lee, and Duane Finley is set to premiere exclusively on Peacock on December 20th. Produced by Maverick Entertainment, this highly anticipated film is set to make its debut on the streaming platform, promising an intense and captivating storyline. The premiere is expected to attract a large audience as viewers tune in to witness the performances of the talented cast members.
